scripts.build: rimraf remove dist && tsc && cpy app.yml dist && cpy --up 1 "src/**/*.{yml,yaml}" dist
scripts.validate: rimraf remove dist && tsc && cpy app.yml dist && cpy --up 1 "src/**/*.{yml,yaml}" dist && npx eslint src --ext ts && vitest run --passWithNoTests && cross-env LOG_LEVEL=NEVER ocp-app-sdk validate
